title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of India:
Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
